meaning: 1. to suggest (rather than depict in detail); 2. freehand style of Chi
sentence: 他喜欢画写意山水，风格自由豪放。
pinyin: Tā xǐhuān huà xiěyì shānshuǐ, fēnggé zìyóu háofàng.
english: He enjoys painting freehand landscapes in a free and bold style.

sentence: 这个字的本义是指太阳。
pinyin: Zhège zì de běnyì shì zhǐ tàiyáng.
english: The original meaning of this character refers to the sun.

sentence: 他已有家室，所以不常加班到很晚。
pinyin: Tā yǐ yǒu jiāshì, suǒyǐ bù cháng jiābān dào hěn wǎn.
english: He has a family, so he doesn't often work late.

sentence: 赤道附近全年气温很高。
pinyin: Chìdào fùjìn quánnián qìwēn hěn gāo.
english: Temperatures near the equator are high all year round.

sentence: 这里地势较高，视野开阔。
pinyin: Zhèlǐ dìshì jiào gāo, shìyě kāikuò.
english: The terrain here is relatively high with a wide view.

sentence: 他钱包里只剩几张纸币。
pinyin: Tā qiánbāo lǐ zhǐ shèng jǐ zhāng zhǐbì.
english: He only has a few paper bills left in his wallet.

sentence: 请在白线内等候地铁。
pinyin: Qǐng zài báixiàn nèi děnghòu dìtiě.
english: Please wait behind the white line for the subway.

sentence: 他是专门研究地震学的教授。
pinyin: Tā shì zhuānmén yánjiū dìzhènxué de jiàoshòu.
english: He is a professor who specializes in seismology.

meaning: 1. to wander; 2. to ramble; 3. recreational hiking; 4. to perambulate
sentence: 我喜欢在公园里漫步放松心情。
pinyin: Wǒ xǐhuān zài gōngyuán lǐ mànbù fàngsōng xīnqíng.
english: I like to wander through the park to relax.

meaning: 1. vice-chairman (of an organization); 2. vice president (of a company
sentence: 他刚被提拔为公司副总裁。
pinyin: Tā gāng bèi tíbá wéi gōngsī fùzǒngcái.
english: He was just promoted to vice president of the company.

sentence: 这座城市以美食著称。
pinyin: Zhè zuò chéngshì yǐ měishí zhùchēng.
english: This city is widely known for its cuisine.

sentence: 网络速率太慢，视频一直在转圈。
pinyin: Wǎngluò sùlǜ tài màn, shìpín yīzhí zài zhuànquān.
english: The network speed is too slow; the video keeps buffering.

sentence: 大伙一起去吃饭吧！
pinyin: Dàhuǒ yīqǐ qù chīfàn ba!
english: Let's all go out to eat together!

meaning: 1. excerpt; 2. selection (from a book); 3. to select; 4. to choose an
sentence: 老师让我们读这本书的节选部分。
pinyin: Lǎoshī ràng wǒmen dú zhè běn shū de jiéxuǎn bùfen.
english: The teacher asked us to read an excerpt from this book.

sentence: 下雨后院子里的排水系统堵了。
pinyin: Xià yǔ hòu yuànzi lǐ de páishuǐ xìtǒng dǔ le.
english: After the rain, the drainage system in the yard got clogged.

meaning: 1. an answering voice; 2. to answer a voice; 3. to respond; 4. to copy
sentence: 妈妈叫他的名字，他立刻应声答道。
pinyin: Māma jiào tā de míngzì, tā lìkè yìngshēng dá dào.
english: Mom called his name and he immediately responded.

sentence: 去年的基数太低，今年增长看起来特别快。
pinyin: Qùnián de jīshù tài dī, jīnnián zēngzhǎng kàn qǐlái tèbié kuài.
english: Last year's base was too low, making this year's growth look especially fast.

meaning: 1. loose in morals; 2. lascivious; 3. licentious; 4. lewd
sentence: 这部电影因内容淫荡被禁止上映。
pinyin: Zhè bù diànyǐng yīn nèiróng yíndàng bèi jìnzhǐ shàngyìng.
english: This film was banned from release due to its lewd content.

sentence: 她把钱包放进了提包里。
pinyin: Tā bǎ qiánbāo fàng jìn le tíbāo lǐ.
english: She put her wallet into her handbag.

sentence: 这台设备通过脉冲信号传输数据。
pinyin: Zhè tái shèbèi tōngguò màichōng xìnhào chuánshū shùjù.
english: This device transmits data through pulse signals.

sentence: 村民们每年都会祭拜山神。
pinyin: Cūnmínmen měinián dōu huì jìbài shānshén.
english: The villagers hold a ritual to honor the mountain god every year.

meaning: 1. to sweep away; 2. to sweep across
sentence: 台风横扫整个海岸，造成严重损失。
pinyin: Táifēng héng sǎo zhěnggè hǎi àn, zàochéng yánzhòng sǔnshī.
english: The typhoon swept across the entire coast, causing severe damage.

sentence: 医生检查后发现肛门附近有炎症。
pinyin: Yīshēng jiǎnchá hòu fāxiàn gāngmén fùjìn yǒu yánzhèng.
english: The doctor found inflammation near the anus after examination.

sentence: 这座修道院建于一千年前。
pinyin: Zhè zuò xiūdàoyuàn jiàn yú yīqiān nián qián.
english: This monastery was built a thousand years ago.

sentence: 他掉转车头，往回开去。
pinyin: Tā diàozhuǎn chētóu, wǎng huí kāi qù.
english: He turned the car around and drove back.

sentence: 法院考虑到他认罪态度好，决定从轻处罚。
pinyin: Fǎyuàn kǎolǜ dào tā rènzuì tàidu hǎo, juédìng cóngqīng chǔfá.
english: The court decided to be lenient in sentencing given his cooperative attitude.

sentence: 她打扮成萝莉风格参加了漫展。
pinyin: Tā dǎbàn chéng luólì fēnggé cānjiā le màn zhǎn.
english: She dressed in Lolita style to attend the comic convention.

meaning: 1. to lobby; 2. to campaign; 3. to promote (an idea, a product); 4. (o
sentence: 这家公司花了大量资金游说议员。
pinyin: Zhè jiā gōngsī huā le dàliàng zījīn yóushuì yìyuán.
english: This company spent a lot of money lobbying lawmakers.

sentence: 她在大学主修计算机科学。
pinyin: Tā zài dàxué zhǔxiū jìsuànjī kēxué.
english: She majored in computer science at university.

sentence: 她从小就梦想进入演艺圈。
pinyin: Tā cóngxiǎo jiù mèngxiǎng jìnrù yǎnyì quān.
english: She dreamed of entering the performing arts world since childhood.

meaning: 1. to leave sth unused; 2. to lie idle
sentence: 这台机器已经闲置很久了，没人用。
pinyin: Zhè tái jīqì yǐjīng xiánzhì hěn jiǔ le, méi rén yòng.
english: This machine has been sitting idle for a long time with no one using it.

sentence: 这里的信仰者每周日都会来做礼拜。
pinyin: Zhèlǐ de xìnyǎngzhě měi zhōurì dōu huì lái zuò lǐbài.
english: The believers here come to worship every Sunday.

sentence: 这个地区蕴藏着丰富的油气资源。
pinyin: Zhège dìqū yùncáng zhe fēngfù de yóuqì zīyuán.
english: This region holds abundant oil and gas resources.

sentence: 发动机的活塞磨损了，需要更换。
pinyin: Fādòngjī de huósāi mósǔn le, xūyào gēnghuàn.
english: The engine's piston is worn out and needs to be replaced.

sentence: 警方在边境抓获了一名毒贩。
pinyin: Jǐngfāng zài biānjìng zhuāhuò le yī míng dúfàn.
english: Police arrested a drug trafficker at the border.

meaning: 1. to premiere (a movie or TV show); 2. premiere (of a movie); 3. firs
sentence: 这部电影昨晚在上海举行了首映。
pinyin: Zhè bù diànyǐng zuówǎn zài Shànghǎi jǔxíng le shǒuyìng.
english: This film held its premiere in Shanghai last night.

meaning: aforestated; stated above; the preceding statement
sentence: 如前述内容所示，这个问题早有记录。
pinyin: Rú qián shù nèi róng suǒ shì, zhè ge wèn tí zǎo yǒu jì lù.
english: As stated above, this issue has long been documented.

meaning: academy of classical learning (Tang Dynasty - Qing Dynasty)
sentence: 这座古老的书院培养了不少历史名人。
pinyin: Zhè zuò gǔ lǎo de shū yuàn péi yǎng le bù shǎo lì shǐ míng rén.
english: This ancient academy cultivated quite a few historically prominent figures.

sentence: 她预约了一次推油按摩，好好放松一下。
pinyin: Tā yù yuē le yī cì tuī yóu àn mó, hǎo hǎo fàng sōng yī xià.
english: She booked an oil massage to properly relax.

meaning: Chinese pearleaf crabapple (Malus asiatica); gift for a wedding or oth
sentence: 树上结满了红彤彤的花红，看起来很诱人。
pinyin: Shù shàng jié mǎn le hóng tóng tóng de huā hóng, kàn qǐ lái hěn yòu rén.
english: The tree is full of bright red crabapples that look very appetizing.

meaning: to cover (a statue) with gold leaf; to gild; (fig.) to prettify; to gl
sentence: 你别给自己贴金了，这件事大家都清楚。
pinyin: Nǐ bié gěi zì jǐ tiē jīn le, zhè jiàn shì dà jiā dōu qīng chǔ.
english: Stop glorifying yourself — everyone knows the truth about this matter.

meaning: (of a perpetrator, victim, weapon, sum of money etc) to be involved in
sentence: 涉案的三名嫌疑人已被警方逮捕。
pinyin: Shè àn de sān míng xián yí rén yǐ bèi jǐng fāng dài bǔ.
english: The three suspects involved in the case have been arrested by police.

sentence: 大使出访时带了几名随员一同前往。
pinyin: Dà shǐ chū fǎng shí dài le jǐ míng suí yuán yī tóng qián wǎng.
english: The ambassador brought several attendants along on the official visit.

sentence: 公司的高层任免需要董事会批准。
pinyin: Gōng sī de gāo céng rèn miǎn xū yào dǒng shì huì pī zhǔn.
english: The appointment and dismissal of senior company executives requires board approval.

sentence: 这座王府已经有三百年的历史了。
pinyin: Zhè zuò wáng fǔ yǐ jīng yǒu sān bǎi nián de lì shǐ le.
english: This prince's mansion is already three hundred years old.

sentence: 他在那次事故中救了我，简直就是我的救主。
pinyin: Tā zài nà cì shì gù zhōng jiù le wǒ, jiǎn zhí jiù shì wǒ de jiù zhǔ.
english: He saved me in that accident — he was truly my savior.

sentence: 这部系列片一共有三季，每季十集。
pinyin: Zhè bù xì liè piàn yī gòng yǒu sān jì, měi jì shí jí.
english: This film series has three seasons in total, with ten episodes each.

meaning: (variant of 真相[zhen1 xiang4]) the truth about sth; the actual facts
sentence: 大家都想知道这件事的真象。
pinyin: Dà jiā dōu xiǎng zhī dào zhè jiàn shì de zhēn xiàng.
english: Everyone wants to know the truth about what happened.

sentence: 当地人把那座山当作神山来敬拜。
pinyin: Dāng dì rén bǎ nà zuò shān dāng zuò shén shān lái jìng bài.
english: The local people worship that mountain as a sacred mountain.

sentence: 历史课上讲到了当年的反动派如何被推翻的。
pinyin: Lì shǐ kè shàng jiǎng dào le dāng nián de fǎn dòng pài rú hé bèi tuī fān de.
english: The history class covered how the reactionaries of that era were overthrown.
